cards.title: Objectives, Constraints, and Feasible Sets
cards.governance_note: Review objective function, decision variables, constraints, feasible set, and parameter assumptions.

cards.title: Trade-Offs, Sensitivity, and Robustness
cards.governance_note: Audit trade-offs, objective weights, uncertainty, sensitivity, robustness, and scenario performance.

cards.title: Fairness, Traceability, and Governance
cards.governance_note: Evaluate distributional effects, fairness constraints, audit trails, appeals, and governance ownership.
